description: A PhD student working on an NLP thesis has a curated 'Thesis References' collection containing 12 papers. After a committee meeting, their advisor identifies 4 papers that are outside the thesis scope and should be removed from the collection—but kept in the library for potential future use. Remove the following 4 papers from the 'Thesis References' collection while ensuring they remain in the main library: 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' (Einstein), 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid' (Watson & Crick), 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al.), and 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search' (Silver et al.).

papers_to_remove: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies
Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid
Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search
